basic_details.job_title: WCD Sukma IT Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Sukma (WCD Sukma) IT Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Sukma IT Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 45 years with relaxations as per state government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Computer/IT field, Good knowledge of MS Office and computer typing, Minimum 0.3 years experience in data management/process documentation/web based reporting in government/semi-government organizations
qualification.details: Graduate degree in Computer/IT field. Good knowledge of MS Office and computer typing. Minimum 0.3 years of experience in data management/process documentation/web-based reporting in government/semi-government organizations.

selection_process: Merit List Walk-in Interview Skill Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Sukma IT Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download WCD Sukma IT Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Sukma IT Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Sukma IT Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the WCD Sukma IT Assistant recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree in Computer/IT field. Additionally, good knowledge of MS Office and computer typing skills are essential.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided as per state government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the IT Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,900.00 per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the WCD Sukma IT Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the IT Assistant position?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of IT Assistant in the Women and Child Development Sukma.

faq.question: Q8. What is the experience required for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 0.3 years of experience in data management, process documentation, or web-based reporting in government or semi-government organizations is required.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection criteria for the IT Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve the creation of a Merit List, followed by a Walk-in Interview and a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. Please check the provided links for download.
